prompt: I have a story document at _bmad-output/user-story-2.md. Create a Jira story from it in OMPBLINK project and make sure the document gets updated with the Jira link.
assertions: Uses sync.mjs link command (not jira.mjs create) for document-based creation
Checks for field mapping file (memory/jira-story-field-mapping.json) before creating
If no mapping exists, runs sync.mjs setup-mapping or proceeds with defaults
The source document is updated with jira_ticket_id in frontmatter or [KEY] prefix in title
A sync state file is created in memory/sync-state/
If mapping has non-empty instructions field, prints them to stdout
